free_text: Angular distributions and absolute cross sections for
the T(p,n)3He and the T(d,n)4He neutron source
The target(sample) cell was filled with tritium at the
pressures 800 torr(for energies of incident particle
of 5 to 8 MeV) and 1300 torr (for higher energies).
Pulse separation time was varied from 400 nsec
to 12.8 micro-sec, with a pulse time resolution of
1.5 nsec full width at half maximum.
